home_subtitle: The desktop platform for digital independence, finally ready for everyday use. Any software with a single click, no compromises.
download_subtitle: Choose the right edition for your hardware.
iso_standard_desc: For AMD and Intel GPUs. The default choice for most users.
iso_nvidia_desc: Includes open-source NVIDIA drivers for best out-of-the-box experience.
steam_tooltip: Application for managing and playing games on Steam
blossomos_tooltip: A free, open desktop OS that genuinely works for anyone.
arc_header_tooltip: Making your apps work with one click.
hub_tooltip: All company resources in one place.
cloud_tooltip: The cloud platform that puts you in control.
freedom4: No AI you didn't ask for
freedoms_footer: Linux-based and actually worth using. Open source code means anyone can verify it's trustworthy. Security researchers, hardware partners, and you can all check for themselves.
arc_description: Everything you know, in one place. Arc Unify makes every package format work on BlossomOS with no terminal and no workarounds. Arc Winapps even brings Windows-only apps to the store.
arc_linux: You're on Linux. The links open directly in your software store.
foundation_kde: A mature, open-source desktop. Stable, powerful and accountable to no one but its community.
immutable_core: The system core is unchangeable. It stays clean, predictable, and stable. More stable than your first feature phone. You install software exactly as you always have.
open_source_description: Every line of code is open for inspection. Security researchers, users, and hardware partners can verify for themselves that it's secure and private.
security_built_in: State-of-the-art offline encryption and hardware-assisted security features, baked into the foundation from the start. Not bolted on as an afterthought.
crt_description: Clever optimizations mean BlossomOS runs beautifully even on the laptop from your school days. Good for your wallet. Good for the planet.
cloud_description: Sync your files, collaborate on documents, and jump on a video call. All on EU-based servers with strong encryption. A reinstall shouldn't be a big deal.
more5: A system you can rely on
community_description: BlossomOS is built in the open by volunteers, designers, and everyday users who got tired of the alternatives. No corporation calling the shots. No agenda beyond making something genuinely good
discord_online: people online on Discord right now
cta_subheader: Standing still is not an option
cta_description: Free, open, and built to last. Try BlossomOS today. It takes less time to install than you'd think.
cta_footer: Free forever. No credit card. No catch.
gaming_description: Steam and thousands of titles, ready to play. BlossomOS is a real gaming platform with the performance to back it up.
business_description: LibreOffice, Thunderbird, enterprise-grade encryption, and EU-hosted cloud storage out of the box. BlossomOS fits into any workflow with no IT hand-holding required.
design_description: Every pixel has been considered. From the custom window chrome to the subtle transitions, BlossomOS looks as good as it performs.
design_hint: Hover to see them in action
home_hero_body: Blossom builds open, privacy-respecting software for people who want a computer that works for them, not against them.
home_product_os_tagline: The desktop OS for digital independence.
home_product_arc_tagline: Any app, any format, one click.
home_product_cloud_tagline: Private cloud storage, hosted in the EU.
home_product_hub_tagline: All company resources in one place.
home_mission_body: Every line of Blossom code is public. No investors to answer to, no users to monetise. Just software made by people who wanted something better.
about_hero_body: Blossom is an open source project building the desktop platform for people who want a computer that works for them, not against them.
about_mission_body1: Modern operating systems have drifted away from users. Forced updates, dark patterns, data collection baked in, and software you never asked for. We started Blossom because we believed it did not have to be this way.
about_mission_body2: BlossomOS is our answer: a desktop OS that is powerful enough for developers, approachable enough for anyone, and honest enough to earn your trust.
about_value_privacy_body: We build software that respects you by default. No telemetry you did not ask for, no data sold to anyone.
about_value_opensource_body: Every line of Blossom code is public. Scrutinize it, fork it, improve it. Trust is earned, not assumed.
about_value_community_body: No corporate agenda. Decisions are made in the open with contributors and users who actually use the software.
about_value_lasting_body: We focus on stability and longevity. Software that works today should still work tomorrow.
about_value_useful_body: Features are added because users need them, not because a roadmap said so. Quality over quantity, always.
about_value_care_body: We sweat the details. From the window buttons to the boot experience, everything is thought through.
about_community_body: BlossomOS is made in the open by volunteers, designers, and everyday users. No corporation calling the shots. Join us.
arc_page_subtitle: Arc is the software store built for BlossomOS. Every package format unified. Windows apps included. No terminal required.
arc_unify_body: The software ecosystem is fragmented. Flatpak here, AppImage there, deb packages somewhere else. Arc Unify brings them all together so you never have to think about formats again.
arc_unify_feature1_body: Flatpak, AppImage, Arch Linux, deb, rpm. Arc Unify handles them all through one consistent interface.
arc_unify_feature2_body: No terminal. No manual dependency hunting. Click install, watch it work.
arc_unify_feature3_body: Apps run in isolated containers. They only get access to what they need.
arc_winapps_body1: Some software only exists on Windows. Arc Winapps brings those apps to BlossomOS through Wine. They appear in your app store, launch like native apps, and integrate with your desktop.
arc_winapps_body2: No dual-boot. No VM management. Just your apps.
arc_demo_body: The store you would expect, for the OS you deserve.
cloud_page_subtitle: Cloud storage and collaboration built for BlossomOS. EU-based, AES-256 encrypted, and designed to integrate seamlessly with your desktop.
cloud_file_sync_body: Your files are available on every device, automatically. Edit on one machine, pick up on another.
cloud_video_body: Built-in video calling with no third-party accounts. Works out of the box with the rest of BlossomOS.
cloud_eu_body: All data lives in EU-based servers under strict European privacy law. Your data stays in Europe.
cloud_settings_body: Your desktop preferences, wallpaper, and app settings follow you across every BlossomOS install.
cloud_privacy_body1: Every file in Blossom Cloud is protected with AES-256 encryption. All traffic between your device and our servers is secured with TLS. Your data is never stored or transferred in the clear.
cloud_privacy_body2: All servers are located in the European Union, subject to GDPR, the world's strongest data protection framework.
cloud_cta_body: Blossom Cloud is free to start. No credit card required.
hub_hero_body: Blossom Hub is the central management platform for organisations running BlossomOS. Devices, users, policies, and software deployment. All in one place, with no vendor lock-in.
hub_feature1_body: See every managed device, user, and deployment status in one place. No more guessing what is running where.
hub_feature2_body: Organise users into groups, assign roles, and control who has access to what across your entire organisation.
hub_feature3_body: Push apps to devices silently or on a schedule. Define approved software lists and keep everything up to date automatically.
hub_feature4_body: Set security baselines, enforce disk encryption, control peripheral access, and ensure every machine meets your standards.
hub_feature5_body: Integrate with your existing identity provider. One login for BlossomOS, Blossom Cloud, and every managed app.
hub_feature6_body: Full activity history for every device and user. Know exactly what changed, when, and who made the change.
hub_feature7_body: Enrol new devices, wipe lost machines, and push configurations remotely without touching the hardware.
hub_feature8_body: Manage offices across multiple locations from a single Hub instance. Separate policies per site or share them globally.
hub_audience1_body: Stop wrestling with disparate tools. Hub gives your IT department one place to manage every BlossomOS device in the company.
hub_audience2_body: Roll out and lock down student devices in minutes. Manage software, block distractions, and keep the fleet up to date without touching each machine.
hub_audience3_body: Enterprise device management without the enterprise price tag. Get started with a handful of machines and scale as you grow.
hub_cta_body: Join the community and be the first to hear when Blossom Hub is available for testing.
docs_subtitle: Guides, references, and everything you need to get the most out of BlossomOS.
docs_cat1_body: Install BlossomOS, set up your account, and get familiar with the desktop.
docs_cat2_body: Installing, managing, and removing applications with Arc Software.
docs_cat3_body: Themes, extensions, keyboard shortcuts, and making BlossomOS yours.
docs_cat4_body: Drivers, peripherals, and getting the most from your specific hardware.
docs_cat5_body: Encryption, firewall, updates, and understanding the security model.
docs_cat6_body: Build, test, and submit changes to BlossomOS and its components.

releases_roadmap_body: Planned for upcoming releases. Subject to change.
